From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Romanian second division football league season

Football league season

[Divizia B](/wiki/Divizia_B "Divizia B")

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Season | 1995–96 |
| Country | [Romania](/wiki/Romania "Romania") |
| Teams | 36 (2x18) |
| Promoted | [Oțelul Târgoviște](/wiki/FCM_T%C3%A2rgovi%C8%99te "FCM Târgoviște") [Jiul Petroșani](/wiki/CSM_Jiul_Petro%C8%99ani "CSM Jiul Petroșani") |
| Relegated | [FC Caracal](/w/index.php?title=Jiul_IELIF_Craiova&action=edit&redlink=1 "Jiul IELIF Craiova (page does not exist)") [Bihor Oradea](/wiki/FC_Bihor_Oradea_(1958) "FC Bihor Oradea (1958)") [Portul Constanța](/wiki/CS_Portul_Constan%C8%9Ba "CS Portul Constanța") [FC Râmnicu Vâlcea](/wiki/Chimia_R%C3%A2mnicu_V%C3%A2lcea "Chimia Râmnicu Vâlcea") |
| Top goalscorer | [Giani Gorga](/w/index.php?title=Giani_Gorga&action=edit&redlink=1 "Giani Gorga (page does not exist)") (16 goals) |
| ← [1994–95](/wiki/1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_B "1994–95 Divizia B")  [1996–97](/wiki/1996%E2%80%9397_Divizia_B "1996–97 Divizia B") → | |

The **1995–96 Divizia B** was the 56th season of the second tier of the [Romanian football league system](/wiki/Romanian_football_league_system "Romanian football league system").

The format has been maintained to two series, each of them having 18 teams. At the end of the season, the winners of the series promoted to [Divizia A](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") and the last two places from both series relegated to [Divizia C](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

### Renamed teams

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995%E2%80%9396_Divizia_B&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Renamed teams")]

*Constant Galați* was renamed as [Dunărea Galați](/wiki/FCM_Dun%C4%83rea_Gala%C8%9Bi "FCM Dunărea Galați").

*Jiul IELIF Craiova* was moved from [Craiova](/wiki/Craiova "Craiova") to [Caracal](/wiki/Caracal,_Romania "Caracal, Romania") and renamed as [FC Caracal](/w/index.php?title=Jiul_IELIF_Craiova&action=edit&redlink=1 "Jiul IELIF Craiova (page does not exist)").
